tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.description: Create package.json, tsconfig.json, and project folder structure.

tasks.title: Create .env configuration
tasks.description: Setup 20 environment variables: NODE_ENV, PORT, API_URL, FRONTEND_URL, JWT_SECRET, ... (+15 more)

tasks.title: Configure 10 secrets
tasks.description: User input needed for: JWT_SECRET, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
tasks.user_prompt:
Please provide the following secrets for your project:

**JWT_SECRET**
  Description: Secret key for JWT token signing
  Example: your-super-secret-jwt-key-min-32-chars

**SMTP_USER**
  Description: SMTP username

**SMTP_PASSWORD**
  Description: SMTP password

**S3_ACCESS_KEY**
  Description: AWS S3 access key

**S3_SECRET_KEY**
  Description: AWS S3 secret key

**STRIPE_SECRET_KEY**
  Description: Stripe secret API key

**STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET**
  Description: Stripe webhook signing secret

**TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN**
  Description: Twilio Auth Token

**OPENAI_API_KEY**
  Description: OpenAI API key

**GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET**
  Description: Google OAuth client secret

You can skip optional secrets by leaving them empty.

tasks.title: Configure database connection
tasks.description: Setup DATABASE_URL in .env and run initial Prisma setup.

tasks.title: Create Docker configuration
tasks.description: Generate docker-compose.yml with all required services (database, redis, etc.).

tasks.title: Install dependencies
tasks.description: Run npm install for all required packages.
tasks.success_criteria: node_modules created, no npm install errors

tasks.title: Prisma schema: auth_credential, encryption_session, user, user_device
tasks.description:
Create ALL Prisma models for EPIC-001 in prisma/schema.prisma.

Models to create:
- auth_credential: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- encryption_session: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- user: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities
- user_device: Define model with all attributes, types, and relations to other entities

Include:
- All model fields with correct Prisma types (@id, @default, @unique, @db.*)
- All relations between models (1:1, 1:N, N:M)
- @@map() table name annotations
- Run: npx prisma generate after schema changes

tasks.title: Feature: phone-registrations (3 endpoints: POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'phone-registrations' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 3 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/phone-registrations — Start phone registration
  POST /api/v1/phone-registrations/{registrationId}/verify — Verify phone registration
  POST /api/v1/phone-registrations/{registrationId}/resend-otp — Resend OTP

tasks.title: Feature: auth (6 endpoints: POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'auth' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 6 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/verify — Verify 2FA PIN during authentication
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/registration/options — Get passkey registration options
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/registration/verify — Verify passkey registration
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/authentication/options — Get passkey authentication options
  POST /api/v1/auth/passkeys/authentication/verify — Verify passkey authentication
  POST /api/v1/auth/pin/verify — Verify PIN during two-step verification

tasks.title: Feature: users (11 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'users' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 11 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/2fa — Enable 2FA with 6-digit PIN
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/2fa — Disable 2FA
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/2fa — Get 2FA status
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/passkeys — List user's passkeys
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/passkeys/{credentialId} — Delete a passkey
  POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Enable additional PIN security
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Update additional PIN
  DELETE /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Disable additional PIN security
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/pin — Get PIN security status
  GET /api/v1/users/{userId}/call-privacy-settings — Get call privacy settings
  PUT /api/v1/users/{userId}/call-privacy-settings — Update call privacy settings

tasks.title: Verify EPIC-001: build + typecheck
tasks.description:
Run all verification steps for EPIC-001:
1. npx prisma generate
2. npx tsc --noEmit (must pass with 0 errors)
3. npm run build
4. cd frontend && npx vite build (if frontend exists)
Fix any errors found.

tasks.title: Validate and integrate EPIC-001
tasks.description: Run all EPIC-001 tests, validate build, and verify all 11 user stories are implemented.
